title: HTTP Semantics, Resources, Methods, Preconditions, and Status · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed operations handoff reconstructs http semantics, resources, methods, preconditions, and status from bounded code and request evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the resource, method, status, validator, and retry contract. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for resource, method, status, validator, and retry contract after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate resource identity, server state, selected representation, transfer content, TypeScript model, and PostgreSQL rows.
Apply safe, idempotent, and cacheable method properties independently and preserve them through application effects.
Choose POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, status, Location, representation, and asynchronous completion behavior from the resource contract.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Semantics Retry Proof
steps.instruction:
review case — A review team handles case 8217 in a multi-tenant case service with a bounded PostgreSQL pool. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to connect method semantics, resource state, preconditions, status, and durable effect; distinguish proxy evidence from origin evidence; then reuse an idempotency key with different input and reject the fingerprint mismatch. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Test methods against retries, duplicate delivery, stale validators, HEAD, OPTIONS, changed state, and durable effects.

Inspect the Semantics Retry Proof trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Node and Express server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Semantics Retry Proof.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for test methods against retries, duplicate delivery, stale validators, head, options, changed state, and durable effects.
